name: cannot lock ref → race (the #200 incident signature)
args: ! [remote rejected] HEAD -> main (cannot lock ref 'refs/heads/main': is at abc but expected def)

name: fetch first → race
args:
Updates were rejected because the remote contains work that you do not have locally.
! [rejected] refs/heads/main -> main (fetch first)

name: tip of your current branch is behind → race
args:
error: failed to push some refs
hint: tip of your current branch is behind its remote counterpart

name: [rejected] without a more specific reason → race
pre-push hook block → rejected-other (PDD gate failure)
args:
[pre-push] BLOCKED: PDD scan FAILED
error: failed to push some refs

name: server-side protected branch → rejected-other
args: remote: error: GH006: Protected branch update failed for refs/heads/main

name: empty string → rejected-other (unrecognized; do not loop blindly)
